name: Satisfactory
description: A first-person open-world factory building game with a dash of exploration and combat.

name: Minecraft Java Edition
description: The original Java Edition of Minecraft, supporting a wide range of mods, plugins, and server types.

defaultEnvVars.description: Server type (VANILLA, FORGE, FABRIC, PAPER, SPIGOT, etc.)

name: Minecraft Bedrock Edition
description: Minecraft Bedrock Edition server supporting cross-platform play on mobile, console, and PC.

name: Valheim
description: A brutal Norse-mythology-inspired survival and sandbox game for 1–10 players.

name: 7 Days to Die
description: An open-world game that blends FPS, survival horror, tower defense, and RPG elements.

name: ARK: Survival Evolved
description: A dinosaur survival game where players tame creatures, craft items, and build bases.

name: ARK: Survival Ascended
description: The Unreal Engine 5 remaster of ARK: Survival Evolved with enhanced graphics and gameplay.

name: Rust
description: A multiplayer survival game where players gather resources, build bases, and compete against each other.

name: Project Zomboid
description: An isometric zombie survival game set in an open-world post-apocalyptic environment.

name: Counter-Strike 2
description: Valve's tactical first-person shooter and the successor to CS:GO, rebuilt on Source 2.

name: Team Fortress 2
description: Valve's team-based multiplayer first-person shooter with cartoonish visuals and diverse classes.

defaultEnvVars.description: Steam Game Server Login Token (required for public servers)

name: Terraria
description: A 2D action-adventure sandbox game featuring exploration, crafting, building, and combat.

defaultEnvVars.description: Path to the world file inside the container

name: Factorio
description: A factory-building strategy game where you mine resources, build production lines, and defend against aliens.

defaultEnvVars.description: Generate a new save if none exists
Load the latest save on startup

name: Starbound
description: A space exploration sandbox game where players travel between planets and build their own worlds.

name: Space Engineers
description: A sandbox game about engineering, construction, exploration, and survival in space and on planets.

name: Conan Exiles
description: An open-world survival game set in the brutal lands of Conan the Barbarian.

name: The Forest
description: A survival horror open-world game where you survive a forest after a plane crash and fight cannibal mutants.

name: Sons of the Forest
description: The sequel to The Forest — a survival horror game featuring improved graphics and a new island to explore.

name: Palworld
description: A creature-collecting survival crafting game featuring Pals — creatures that can fight, work, and be farmed.

name: Enshrouded
description: A survival action RPG set in a vast voxel-based world shrouded in a deadly fog.

name: V Rising
description: A vampire survival game where you rise from slumber to build a castle and conquer enemies.

name: DayZ
description: An open-world survival game set in a post-Soviet country overrun by zombie-like infected.

name: Garry's Mod
description: A physics sandbox game with limitless gameplay possibilities driven by addons, gamemodes, and community creativity.

name: Don't Starve Together
description: A multiplayer survival game set in a dark wilderness filled with strange creatures and dangers.

name: Killing Floor 2
description: A co-op and versus multiplayer horror FPS where players face off against waves of mutant Zeds.

name: Squad
description: A large-scale multiplayer military FPS emphasizing teamwork, communication, and realistic tactics.

name: Arma 3
description: A military tactical shooter with combined arms gameplay, large open-world maps, and extensive modding.

name: Barotrauma
description: A 2D co-op submarine survival game set deep underwater on Jupiter's moon Europa.

name: Among Us (Impostor)
description: A custom Among Us server using the Impostor project, enabling private online lobbies.

defaultEnvVars.description: Public IP address for the server

name: Eco
description: An online world where players build civilizations to prevent a meteor strike while preserving the ecosystem.

name: Soulmask
description: An online survival game with deep NPC management, featuring tribespeople you recruit and manage.

name: Stationeers
description: A complex construction and management simulator of running a space station or building a colony on a hostile planet.

name: Astroneer
description: Colorful space exploration adventure set during a 25th-century gold rush where players explore and reshape procedural planets.

defaultEnvVars.description: Steam app ID for Astroneer dedicated server
